summary: Guard printAutoCards against short headers slices (len==0 early return, len>2 wrap before headers[2:]).
reason: When prioritizeAllHeaders returned <2 entries the headers[2:] slice panicked with 'slice bounds out of range'. Surfaced by Greptile review of the initial print.
validated_outcome: go test ./internal/cli passes; CLI no longer panics on items whose displayable fields collapse to 0/1 keys.
